goals: List all memories currently stored to understand what information is being retained
Search for specific memories related to personal preferences or past interactions
Add a new memory about a preference or important context
Delete an outdated or irrelevant memory to manage stored information

user_agent_config.role: government employee on a risky journey
user_agent_config.personality: Supportive and cautious, values clear information and organized records. Prefers to understand systems before relying on them.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with basic computer usage but does not know internal tool names or APIs. Understands the concept of memory storage but is learning how this specific system works.

end_condition: The user has reviewed their stored memories, added relevant new information, and cleaned up any outdated entries to their satisfaction.
